heading: Prioritization
label: 9305 Prioritization
text: In carrying out this chapter, the Entity shall focus its support for sustainable chemistry activities on those that achieve, to the highest extent practicable, the goals outlined in the chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle E (§§ 261–267) of title II of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of subtitle E to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 116–283, div. A134 Stat. 3497Jan. 1, 2021
